name: Black Pepper
description_for_ai: A highly prized spice traded across the Indian Ocean. Experienced merchants know its value precisely. Often used as currency itself in long distance trade.

name: Cardamom
description_for_ai: A fragrant and expensive spice prized for culinary and medicinal uses. Its scarcity raises its value among elite buyers.

name: Turmeric
description_for_ai: A common and versatile root used as a dye, medicine, and spice. Widely used by all social classes.

name: Sandalwood Powder
description_for_ai: A luxury aromatic used in perfumes, incense, and rituals. Highly valued and often bought by temples and nobles.

name: Dried Ginger
description_for_ai: A staple spice used in cooking and medicine; popular among traders and household cooks.

name: Betel Nut
description_for_ai: A widely consumed stimulant chewed in many social settings; has cultural importance and steady demand.
